chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-193 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 590/25 2.For orders on CMA 591/25 3.For hearing of main case 28-07-2025 Mr. Riaz Ahmed Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2&3. Through instant petition, petitioner seeks directions to official respondents to provide protection and not to cause any sort of harassment to her and her sons so also not to lodge any false FIR against them at the behest of local Wadero or opposite party. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant A.G present in Court in other matters while waiving notice submits that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. After such statement, learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Since the right of protection of every citizen including the petitioner is the fundamental right protected and guaranteed under the Constitution of Pakistan; therefore, official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. However, it is made clear that this order shall not come in the way either in criminal, civil or family cases, if pending between both the parties before the competent Courts of law. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed applications in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
